mnemonics.title: STATIC
mnemonics.content: S - Shared utility, T - Type of method, A - Accessible via interface name, T - Tool for related functionality, I - Implicitly public, C - Called without instance creation

mnemonics.title: Shoehorn Sentence
mnemonics.content: Static methods in interfaces are like a Shoehorn, helping you slip into utility functions without tripping over instance creation.

mnemonics.title: Rhyme Time
mnemonics.content: Static methods in interfaces are fine, implicitly public and always defined, no instance needed, just the interface name, and you'll be just fine!
